evals.prompt: We need to announce database maintenance next Tuesday from 2am to 4am UTC. New deployments will be paused but existing ones won't be affected.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a scheduled maintenance announcement that names the component, gives the full time window in UTC, describes what will and won't be affected, and includes any preparation steps.
assertions: Includes start and end time in UTC
Includes preparation advice or states none needed
Suggests next step: post in-progress update when maintenance starts

evals.prompt: The database maintenance started. Everything is going as planned so far. Post an in-progress update.
evals.expected_output: Should produce an in-progress update that goes beyond boilerplate, confirms things are on track, and reaffirms the expected end time.
assertions: Goes beyond 'Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress'
Confirms things are proceeding as planned

evals.prompt: Database maintenance finished 30 minutes early. Everything is back to normal.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a completed update stating actual end time, that it finished early, all services are normal, and whether users need to take any action.
assertions: Notes it finished ahead of schedule
States whether user action is needed

evals.prompt: The maintenance is taking longer than expected. We originally said 4am UTC but it's looking like 5:30am now because the migration is slower than expected.
evals.expected_output: Should produce an extension notice with original and new end times, reason for delay, and confirmation of whether impact has changed.
assertions: States new estimated end time (05:30 UTC)
Confirms whether user impact has changed
Sets a time for next update

evals.prompt: We need to cancel the maintenance we announced for tomorrow. Found a bug in the migration script.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a cancellation notice referencing the specific maintenance, explaining why, and stating whether it will be rescheduled.
assertions: Explains the reason (bug in migration script)
States whether it will be rescheduled
Confirms no current impact to services

evals.prompt: We need to do emergency maintenance on the API in 2 hours. Full downtime for about 30 minutes.
evals.expected_output: Should note that 2 hours is short notice for full downtime (recommended 72h), proceed with the announcement, and suggest treating it as an incident if the urgency warrants it.
assertions: Flags that 2 hours notice is below recommended lead time for full downtime
Suggests considering incident-communication if this is urgent/unplanned
Includes all required elements (time, impact, preparation)

evals.prompt: Write a maintenance announcement for our API maintenance window
evals.expected_output: Should read .agents/status-page-context.md and use component names, default maintenance window, and tone from context.
assertions: References default maintenance window if defined in context

evals.prompt: Our API just went down unexpectedly, help me write something
evals.expected_output: Should redirect to incident-communication skill since this is an unplanned outage, not scheduled maintenance.
assertions: Recognizes this is an unplanned incident, not maintenance
Points user to the incident-communication skill
Does not write a maintenance announcement
